# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.
# Category: ssrf

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Cache;
use GuzzleHttp\Client as GuzzleClient;

class LinkPreviewController extends Controller
{
    private $guzzleClient;

    public function __construct(GuzzleClient $guzzleClient)
    {
        $this->guzzleClient = $guzzleClient;
    }

    public function index(Request $request)
    {
        $url = $request->input('url');
        $cacheKey = 'link_preview:' . $url;
        $cachedResponse = Cache::get($cacheKey);

        if (!$cachedResponse) {
            try {
                $response = $this->guzzleClient->head($url);

                // Here you can use the response to generate a preview (e.g., title, thumbnail, etc.) based on the response status and headers.
                // For example, for the title:
                preg_match('/<title>(.*)<\/title>/i', $response->getBody(), $matches);
                $title = isset($matches[1]) ? $matches[1] : '';

                Cache::put($cacheKey, [
                    'status_code' => $response->getStatusCode(),
                    'status_text' => $response->getReasonPhrase(),
                    'title' => $title
                ], now()->addMinutes(10));
            } catch (\Exception $e) {
                // Handle exceptions here (e.g., invalid URL, server error, etc.)
            }
        }

        return response()->json([
            'status_code' => isset($cachedResponse['status_code']) ? $cachedResponse['status_code'] : '',
            'status_text' => isset($cachedResponse['status_text']) ? $cachedResponse['status_text'] : '',
            'title' => isset($cachedResponse['title']) ? $cachedResponse['title'] : ''
        ]);
    }
}
